domain: Urban Bird Management (Nest Removal & Population Control)
description: Avian deterrence and wildlife monitoring at airports and agricultural zones. Utilize bio-inspired flight kinematics, ultrasonic payloads, and real-time species classification via edge computing.
learning_objectives: Understand the ecological and regulatory context of bird management
Build and train AI models for bird and nest detection in cluttered urban environments
Create geospatial data pipelines for tracking bird colonies and nesting sites over time
Deploy optimized models on edge hardware for real‑time bird detection and harassment
Implement safe, non‑lethal interaction mechanisms (sound, visual, physical)
Design and simulate drone behaviors for nest removal and population control
Comply with wildlife protection laws and public safety regulations

modules.title: Real-time Avian Classification
modules.description: Deploy lightweight models to classify bird species from long distances to determine specific deterrence strategies.
topics: Biomimetic flight patterns for predator simulation
Automated deployment protocols for active runways
Edge TPU optimization for multi-modal sensing

capstone_project.name: Autonomous Urban Bird Management Drone
capstone_project.description: Build and test a drone system that can autonomously survey a designated area (e.g., a city park, a building complex), detect nests and birds, and apply non‑lethal deterrents (sound, laser) to discourage nesting. The system must generate a nest registry map, log all actions, and avoid disturbing protected species. Evaluate effectiveness through before‑after bird counts.
deliverables: Trained bird and nest detection models (quantized, <100 MB)
ROS 2 nodes for detection, deterrent control, and logging
PostGIS database with nest registry and flight logs
HIL simulation report with metrics (detection rate, false positives)
Ethical impact assessment and regulatory compliance plan

resources.name: International Bird Strike Committee Guidelines
resources.description: Best practices for bird management at airports

glossary.definition: Relating to the imitation of biological entities and processes.
Classifying an audio clip into categories such as different bird calls.
